scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production && npm run pages:prod
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env dev && npm run pages:dev
scripts.cf:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env production --remote
scripts.cf:migrate:dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env dev --remote
scripts.pages:prod: wrangler pages deploy pages-proxy --project-name pet-place --branch main
scripts.pages:dev: wrangler pages deploy pages-proxy-dev --project-name pet-place-dev --branch dev
